ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marine_equipment" (
  "ooi_barcode" TEXT /* Unique barcode identifier for the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "quant" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Manufacturer's serial number or other identifier */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the equipment */,
  "source_of_equipment" TEXT /* Source of the equipment or award number */,
  "title_vesting" TEXT /* Indicates whether title vests in the recipient or federal government */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the equipment */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number or custody location */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of acquisition */,
  "original_cost" REAL /* Original cost of the equipment */,
  "federal_participation" REAL /* Percentage of federal participation in funding */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the equipment */,
  "primary_tag_date" TEXT /* Primary tag date for tracking purposes */,
  "primary_tag_organization" TEXT /* Organization responsible for the primary tag */,
  "primary_institute_asset_tag" TEXT /* Primary institute asset tag number */,
  "secondary_tag_date" TEXT /* Secondary tag date for tracking purposes */,
  "second_tag_organization" TEXT /* Organization responsible for the secondary tag */,
  "institute_asset_tag" TEXT /* Institute asset tag number */,
  "doi_tag_date" TEXT /* DOI tag date for tracking purposes */,
  "doi_tag_organization" TEXT /* Organization responsible for the DOI tag */,
  "doi_institute_asset_tag" TEXT /* DOI institute asset tag number */,
  "depreciation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate depreciation */,
  "depreciation_rate" REAL /* Annual depreciation rate */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the equipment after depreciation */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Frequency and details of maintenance activities */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance activity */,
  "department_id" TEXT /* ID of the department currently holding the equipment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user responsible for the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., in use, in repair, decommissioned) */,
  "funding_details" TEXT /* Detailed JSON object containing information about various funding sources */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with federal regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ooi_barcode")
)
column_names: Unique barcode identifier for the equipment
Description of the equipment
Quantity of the equipment available
Manufacturer of the equipment
Model of the equipment
Manufacturer's serial number or other identifier
Firmware version of the equipment
